name: Lucknow

seo.title: Packers & Movers in Lucknow — 740+ Verified Vendors | ShiftIndia
seo.description: Compare 740+ verified packers and movers in Lucknow. Instant quotes starting ₹4,000. Gomti Nagar, Hazratganj, Aliganj covered. Live tracking, ₹5L protection.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Lucknow
hero.subtitle: Gomti Nagar to Aliganj, Hazratganj to Indira Nagar — 740+ verified movers across the City of Nawabs.

intro:
Lucknow is witnessing rapid residential growth along the Gomti Nagar Extension, Shaheed Path, and Sushant Golf City corridors. ShiftIndia's network of 740+ verified packers and movers covers every pocket — from heritage homes in Hazratganj to new apartments in Eldeco estates.

Transparent pricing, no hidden charges, and same-day quotes.
whyUs: Lucknow's expanding metro and new expressways have changed traffic patterns. Our vendors plan routes to avoid Hazratganj bottlenecks and account for building access restrictions in newer societies.

faqs.q: How much does a local move cost in Lucknow?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹4,500. 2 BHK typically ₹7,000 – ₹13,000 depending on floors and distance.

faqs.q: Do you cover Gomti Nagar Extension?
faqs.a: Yes — all areas including Gomti Nagar Extension, Sushant Golf City, Eldeco, and Shaheed Path colonies.

faqs.q: Can you help with office relocations?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle residential and commercial moves of all sizes.
